heading: Repealed. ,June 7, 1956, ch. 374, § 306(2)70 Stat. 254
label: 32, 33 Repealed. ,June 7, 1956, ch. 374, § 306(2)70 Stat. 254
notes: Section 32, , , authorized hospitalization of dependents of naval and Marine Corps personnel. See section 1071 et seq. of Title 10, Armed Forces.act May 10, 1943, ch. 95, § 257 Stat. 80
Section 33, , , defined “dependents” and “children”. See section 1071 et seq. of Title 10.act May 10, 1943, ch. 95, § 357 Stat. 81
